name: orchardcore-net
description: Setup recipe that seeds the orchardcore.net site for the Canopy theme.

Layers.Name: Always
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on any page of this site.

Layers.Name: Homepage
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are only displayed on the homepage.

Layers.Name: Developers
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on developer-focused pages.

Layers.Name: Business
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on business-focused pages.

data.DisplayText: Build Better. Ship Faster. With Orchard Core.

TitlePart.Title: Build Better. Ship Faster. With Orchard Core.

Results.Html: Delivered a modern, modular digital workplace with faster editorial workflows.
Improved access to city services with scalable publishing and forms-ready architecture.

Summary.Text: Run hundreds of sites from one install.

Body.Html: Run hundreds of sites from one install.

Summary.Text: Visual workflow designer with email, HTTP, and scripting.

Body.Html: Visual workflow designer with email, HTTP, and scripting.

Summary.Text: Lucene and Elasticsearch support built in.
Azure Blob, S3, and local disk storage.

Body.Html: Azure Blob, S3, and local disk storage.

Summary.Text: True multilingual content with culture routing.
Granular roles, permissions, and audit trail.
